quote: In Dal Corso's reference texts, hawe ne accounts for 298 of 2232 evidential tokens (13.35%), and hawe as for a further 94 (4.21%), making the two hawe-forms together the second most frequent pair after ruwe ne

suggestion: Add the frequency of 'ruwe ne' or rephrase to avoid direct comparison without full data.
